title: Laura Mulvey | Visual Pleasure And Narrative Cinema Explained in Hindi
description:
Join us in this exploration of gender, society, and visual storytelling. Don't forget to hit the Subscribe button and head to https://theliteraturetalks.com/ for more insights on English literature and notes to further your learning! 

Explore the world of Laura Mulvey, Visual Pleasure And Narrative Cinema and her groundbreaking contributions to film theory in this engaging video. We delve into the concept of the male gaze, a key idea in her work, which has had a profound impact on how women are represented in cinema and media. Discover how Mulvey's theories draw from the psychoanalytic works of Sigmund Freud and Jacques Lacan to reveal hidden meanings and power structures in society.

But the relevance goes beyond just film – it touches on society's norms and challenges the status quo. In particular, we discuss why English learners in India should pay attention to Mulvey's ideas and how they relate to the unique dynamics of Bollywood.

#filmtheory  #GenderRepresentation #lauramulvey #malegaze  #bollywood  #englishliterature #englishliteraturenotes #englishhonours #englishhons #baenglish #schoolofopenlearning #delhiuniversity
tags: laura mulvey visual pleasure and narrative cinema
